problems.question: The crowd was surprised to see that a seven-year-old boy was able to swim as (　　) the teenagers.
problems.ja: ７歳の少年が10代の若者と同じくらい速く泳げることがわかり，群衆は驚いた。
problems.en: The crowd was surprised to see that a seven-year-old boy was able to swim as fast as the teenagers.

problems.question: Travelling into the city center is as convenient by subway (　　) by bus.
problems.ja: 街の中心に移動するのはバスと同じくらい地下鉄も便利だ。
problems.en: Travelling into the city center is as convenient by subway as it is by bus.

problems.question:
この映画は皆が言うほど面白くない。
This movie (say / not / it / interesting / people / as / is / so) is.
problems.rawAnswer: is not so interesting as people say it
problems.ja: この映画は皆が言うほど面白くない。
problems.answer: is not so interesting as people say it
problems.en: This movie is not so interesting as people say it is.

problems.question:
私にはその計画をやり遂げるのに十分な資金がありません。
I haven't got (as / as / I really / much / need / money) to complete the project.
problems.rawAnswer: as much money as I really need
problems.ja: 私にはその計画をやり遂げるのに十分な資金がありません。
problems.answer: as much money as I really need
problems.en: I haven't got as much money as I really need to complete the project.

problems.question: Traveling by air costs (　　) taking the train.
problems.ja: 飛行機での移動は，電車の２倍の費用がかかる。
problems.en: Traveling by air costs twice as much as taking the train.

problems.question: Carol is the daughter of a luxury hotel owner, and last month she bought a sports car which was (　　) as mine.
problems.ja: キャロルは高級ホテルのオーナーの娘で，先月，私の車の10倍の値段のスポーツカーを購入した。
problems.en: Carol is the daughter of a luxury hotel owner, and last month she bought a sports car which was ten times as expensive as mine.

problems.question:
前の事務所の大きさは新しい事務所の３分の１だった。
Our old office (large / as / third / was / one) as our new one.
problems.ja: 前の事務所の大きさは新しい事務所の３分の１だった。
problems.answer: was one third as large
problems.en: Our old office was one third as large as our new one.

problems.question:
このエアコンの消費電力はあのエアコンの２分の１だ。
This air conditioner uses (electricity / much / as / that / one / as / half).
problems.rawAnswer: half as much electricity as that one
problems.ja: このエアコンの消費電力はあのエアコンの２分の１だ。
problems.answer: half as much electricity as that one
problems.en: This air conditioner uses half as much electricity as that one.

problems.question: Our new computer is almost (　　) conventional ones.
problems.ja: 私たちの新しいコンピューターは従来のもののほぼ半分の大きさだ。
problems.en: Our new computer is almost half the size of conventional ones.

problems.question: A car (approximately one-tenth / runs / speed / at / of / the) a jet plane.
problems.rawAnswer: runs at approximately one-tenth the speed of
problems.ja: 車はジェット機のおよそ10分の１の速さで走る。
problems.answer: runs at approximately one-tenth the speed of
problems.en: A car runs at approximately one-tenth the speed of a jet plane.

problems.question: We didn't want to go home, so we killed (　　) at the restaurant.
problems.ja: 私たちは家に帰りたくなかったので，レストランでできる限りの時間をつぶした。
problems.en: We didn't want to go home, so we killed as much time as possible at the restaurant.

problems.question: Read this book (　　).
problems.ja: できるだけ注意深くこの本を読みなさい。
problems.en: Read this book as carefully as you can.

problems.question:
(a) She is a singer rather than an actress.
(b) She is (　　) (　　) (　　) an actress (　　) a singer.
problems.ja: (a)(b) 彼女は女優というよりも歌手だ。
problems.answer: not so much，as
problems.en: She is not so much，as an actress not so much，as a singer.

problems.question: He did not (　　) a word of thanks when I helped him with his assignment.
problems.ja: 私が彼の宿題を手伝ったとき，彼は感謝の言葉さえ言わなかった。
problems.en: He did not so much as say a word of thanks when I helped him with his assignment.

problems.question: The angry person went away without so much (　　) some apologetic words.
problems.ja: 謝罪の言葉すら言わずに，その怒った人は立ち去った。
problems.en: The angry person went away without so much as saying some apologetic words.

problems.question: He is (　　) diligent a man as ever lived.
problems.ja: 彼は並外れて勤勉な男だ。
problems.en: He is as diligent a man as ever lived.

problems.question: This is as difficult a task as (　　) I have ever faced.
problems.ja: これは私が今まで直面したどの課題にも劣らず困難な課題だ。
problems.en: This is as difficult a task as any I have ever faced.

problems.question: We were surprised to hear that (　　) 200 people attended the lecture.
problems.ja: 200人もの人々がその講義に出席したと聞いて，私たちは驚いた。
problems.en: We were surprised to hear that as many as 200 people attended the lecture.

problems.question: In some parts of the world, people working six or seven days a week make (　　) four dollars.
problems.ja: 世界の一部の地域では，週に６，７日働いてもわずか４ドルしか稼げない人たちもいる。
problems.en: In some parts of the world, people working six or seven days a week make as little as four dollars.

problems.question: They invented printing as (　　) as the fifteenth century.
problems.ja: 早くも15世紀に彼らは印刷術を発明した。
problems.en: They invented printing as early as the fifteenth century.

problems.question: Jiro's car is (　　) more economical than my car.
problems.ja: ジロウの車は私の車よりもはるかに経済的だ。
problems.en: Jiro's car is much more economical than my car.

problems.question:
(a) Mike is not so ill-tempered as his elder brother.
(b) Mike is (　　) ill-tempered (　　) his elder brother.
problems.ja: マイクは彼の兄ほど怒りっぽくない。
problems.answer: less，than
problems.en: Mike is less，than ill-tempered less，than his elder brother.

problems.question: He is (　　) than clever.
problems.ja: 彼は利口というよりも聡明だ。
problems.en: He is more wise than clever.

problems.question:
オリオン座の星ベテルギウスは直径が太陽の700倍もある。
Betelgeuse, a star in the constellation of Orion, has a diameter (700 / larger/ of / sun / than / that / the / times).
problems.rawAnswer: 700 times larger than that of the sun
problems.ja: オリオン座の星ベテルギウスは直径が太陽の700倍もある。
problems.answer: 700 times larger than that of the sun
problems.en: Betelgeuse, a star in the constellation of Orion, has a diameter 700 times larger than that of the sun.

problems.question: John is (　　) of the two boys.
problems.ja: ジョンは２人の少年のうちの背の高い方だ。
problems.en: John is the taller of the two boys.

problems.question: (　　) went on, the more tired the players became.
problems.ja: 試合が長引けば長引くほど，選手たちはますます疲れてきた。
problems.en: The longer the game went on, the more tired the players became.

problems.question:
時間をかければかけるほど英語は上達する。
The more (you / your / the / improves / time / spend, / more / English).
problems.rawAnswer: time you spend, the more your English improves
problems.ja: 時間をかければかけるほど英語は上達する。
problems.answer: time you spend, the more your English improves
problems.en: The more time you spend, the more your English improves.

problems.question:
ビルは，父親が仕事で忙しいのでますます兄に頼るようになった。
Bill came to depend on (more / brother / was / his / all / his / the / because / father) busy with his job.
problems.rawAnswer: his brother all the more because his father was
problems.ja: ビルは，父親が仕事で忙しいのでますます兄に頼るようになった。
problems.answer: his brother all the more because his father was
problems.en: Bill came to depend on his brother all the more because his father was busy with his job.

problems.question:
ジェームズは裕福であっても少しも幸せではない。（２語不要）
James is (for / happier / happy / less / none / the) his wealth.
problems.rawAnswer: none the happier for（happy, less不要）
problems.ja: ジェームズは裕福であっても少しも幸せではない。（２語不要）
problems.answer: none the happier for
problems.en: James is none the happier for his wealth.

problems.question:
１か月以上も海外にいたら，日本食が食べたくなるでしょうね。
I will begin to miss Japanese food (a month / I / than / more / if / stay abroad for).
problems.rawAnswer: if I stay abroad for more than a month
problems.ja: １か月以上も海外にいたら，日本食が食べたくなるでしょうね。
problems.answer: if I stay abroad for more than a month
problems.en: I will begin to miss Japanese food if I stay abroad for more than a month.

problems.question:
京都まではバスで２時間かかりません。
(two hours / journey to / less than / the bus / takes / Kyoto).
problems.rawAnswer: The bus journey to Kyoto takes less than two hours
problems.ja: 京都まではバスで２時間かかりません。
problems.answer: The bus journey to Kyoto takes less than two hours
problems.en: The bus journey to Kyoto takes less than two hours.

problems.question: I had <u>no more than</u> two thousand yen when I arrived at the station.
problems.ja: 駅に着いたとき，私はわずか2,000円しか持っていなかった。
problems.en: I had no more than two thousand yen when I arrived at the station.

problems.question:
(a) The painting cost him no less than a million dollars.
(b) He paid as (　　) as a million dollars for the painting.
problems.ja: (a) (b) 彼はその絵に100万ドルも支払った。
problems.en: He paid as much as a million dollars for the painting.

problems.question: A whale is (　　) a horse is.
problems.ja: 馬がそうでないように，クジラも魚ではない。
problems.en: A whale is no more a fish than a horse is.

problems.question: I don't believe his story (　　) than you do.
problems.ja: あなたと同様に，私も彼の話を信じません。
problems.en: I don't believe his story any more than you do.

problems.question:
私には，彼女がアインシュタインと同じくらい頭が良いように思える。（１語不足）
It seems to me that (Einstein / she / than / is / no / intelligent).
problems.rawAnswer: she is no less intelligent than Einstein（less不足）
problems.ja: 私には，彼女がアインシュタインと同じくらい頭が良いように思える。（１語不足）
problems.answer: she is no less intelligent than Einstein
problems.en: It seems to me that she is no less intelligent than Einstein.
problems.note: 1語不足の語もチップに含まれています

problems.question: The man was none (　　) the writer the journalists had been looking for.
problems.ja: その男性は，記者たちが探していた作家に他ならなかった。
problems.en: The man was none other than the writer the journalists had been looking for.

problems.question:
その子どもたちは冬に湖で泳ぐような愚かなことはしなかった。
The children (swim / to / in / knew / than / better / the) lake in the winter.
problems.rawAnswer: knew better than to swim in the
problems.ja: その子どもたちは冬に湖で泳ぐような愚かなことはしなかった。
problems.answer: knew better than to swim in the
problems.en: The children knew better than to swim in the lake in the winter.

problems.question:
私はほとんど英語を話せません。ドイツ語はなおさらです。（コンマを１か所用いること）
I can (less / much / hardly / speak English / German).
problems.rawAnswer: hardly speak English, much less German
problems.ja: 私はほとんど英語を話せません。ドイツ語はなおさらです。（コンマを１か所用いること）
problems.answer: hardly speak English, much less German
problems.en: I can hardly speak English, much less German.

problems.question: When he was driving ①<u>me</u> ②<u>home</u>, he told me ③<u>that</u> he was ④<u>not longer</u> living with his wife.
problems.ja: 私を家まで車で送ってくれているときに，妻とはもはや一緒に暮らしていないと彼は言った。
problems.en: When he was driving me home, he told me that he was no longer living with his wife.

problems.question: Our teacher has told us that DVDs are (　　) videotapes for foreign language learning.
problems.ja: 私たちの先生は，外国語を学ぶためにはビデオテープよりもDVDの方が優れていると言っている。
problems.en: Our teacher has told us that DVDs are superior to videotapes for foreign language learning.

problems.question: I prefer staying home (　　) going out on Sundays.
problems.ja: 私は，日曜日は外出するよりも家にいたい。
problems.en: I prefer staying home to going out on Sundays.

problems.question: Although he only joined the firm last year, he is (　　) to me already.
problems.ja: 彼は去年，入社したばかりだが，すでに僕よりも地位が上である。
problems.en: Although he only joined the firm last year, he is senior to me already.

problems.question: Diamonds are (　　) all substances; they can be cut only by other diamonds.
problems.ja: ダイヤモンドはあらゆる物質の中で最も硬く，別のダイヤモンドによってしか切ることができない。
problems.en: Diamonds are the hardest of all substances; they can be cut only by other diamonds.

problems.question: Of ①<u>all the films</u> released this month, ②<u>the one</u> with ③<u>lots of</u> special effects is ④<u>too</u> far the most exciting.
problems.ja: 今月公開されたすべての映画の中では，特殊効果をふんだんに用いたその映画がずばぬけておもしろい。
problems.en: Of all the films released this month, the one with lots of special effects is by far the most exciting.

problems.question:
これは私が今までにエッセイを書いたテーマの中でも飛びぬけてすばらしい。
This is (theme / on / the / best / very) which I have ever written an essay.
problems.ja: これは私が今までにエッセイを書いたテーマの中でも飛びぬけてすばらしい。
problems.answer: the very best theme on
problems.en: This is the very best theme on which I have ever written an essay.

problems.question: This shopping mall is the second (　　) one in New York.
problems.ja: このショッピングモールはニューヨークで２番目に大きいものだ。
problems.en: This shopping mall is the second largest one in New York.

problems.question: ①<u>Although</u> it is ②<u>neither</u> new nor big, the house we bought ③<u>is</u> one of the most elegant ④<u>building</u> in this city.
problems.ja: 新しくもなく大きくもないが，私たちが買った家は，この街で最も洗練された建物の１つだ。
problems.en: Although it is neither new nor big, the house we bought is one of the most elegant buildings in this city.

problems.question: The curry at that restaurant is (　　) I've ever had.
problems.ja: あのレストランのカレーは今まで食べた中で一番まずい。
problems.en: The curry at that restaurant is the worst I've ever had.

problems.question:
こんなに賢いロボットは見たことがない。
This is (seen / cleverest / have / ever / robot / I / the).
problems.rawAnswer: the cleverest robot I have ever seen
problems.ja: こんなに賢いロボットは見たことがない。
problems.answer: the cleverest robot I have ever seen
problems.en: This is the cleverest robot I have ever seen.

problems.question: (　　) least 530 of them died in this fire.
problems.ja: この火災で彼らのうち少なくとも530名が死亡した。
problems.en: At least 530 of them died in this fire.

problems.question:
その男の子はこのクラスで一番利口だ。
(other / as smart / student / is / as / no / in this class) the boy.
problems.rawAnswer: No other student in this class is as smart as
problems.ja: その男の子はこのクラスで一番利口だ。
problems.answer: No other student in this class is as smart as
problems.en: No other student in this class is as smart as the boy.

problems.question: (　　) is so precious as time.
problems.ja: 時間ほど貴重なものはない。
problems.en: Nothing is so precious as time.

problems.question:
日本には，富士山ほど高い山は他にない。
No (mountain / Japan / than / higher / other / is / in) Mt. Fuji.
problems.rawAnswer: other mountain in Japan is higher than
problems.ja: 日本には，富士山ほど高い山は他にない。
problems.answer: other mountain in Japan is higher than
problems.en: No other mountain in Japan is higher than Mt. Fuji.

problems.question:
私に関する限り，今は健康が一番大切なのだ。
As for myself, (　　) (　　) (　　) precious than my health now.
problems.ja: 私に関する限り，今は健康が一番大切なのだ。
problems.answer: nothing is more
problems.en: As for myself, nothing is more precious than my health now.

problems.question:
(a) The ostrich is the largest bird in the world.
(b) The ostrich is larger than (　　) (　　) (　　) in the world.
problems.ja:
(a) ダチョウは世界最大の鳥だ。
(b) ダチョウは世界中の他のどの鳥よりも大きい。
problems.answer: any other bird
problems.en: The ostrich is larger than any other bird in the world.

problems.question: Time is more precious than (　　).
problems.ja: 時間は他の何よりも貴重なものだ。
problems.en: Time is more precious than anything else.
